title: helianthermum oelandicum var. canescens
intro: Helianthermum oelandicum var. canescens, also known as Icelandic mayweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Icelandic mayweed include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Icelandic mayweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
